context: Tests whether the agent identifies all three blocking publication requirements: private must be false, evaluation scenarios directory must exist with 5+ scenarios, and the quality audit must be run to verify A-grade threshold. A naive agent might only catch the private flag and miss the evals and audit requirements.

checklist.name: private:true flagged as blocker
checklist.description: readiness-report.md identifies private: true as a blocking issue that must be changed to false before publishing

checklist.name: Missing evals flagged as blocker
checklist.description: readiness-report.md identifies the absence of an evals/ (or evaluation-scenarios/) directory with 5+ scenarios as a blocking requirement

checklist.name: Quality audit flagged as blocker
checklist.description: readiness-report.md identifies that the quality audit (skill-quality-auditor) has not been run and an A-grade score must be verified before publishing

checklist.name: Remediation commands provided
checklist.description: Report includes specific commands or actions to resolve at least 2 of the 3 blocking issues

checklist.name: Correct verdict
checklist.description: Report concludes with NOT READY (or equivalent) given the blocking issues present
